name: Webshell via INTO OUTFILE
description: A PostgreSQL instance with the COPY command available. Use SQL injection to write a command output to a readable location and exfiltrate the flag from an environment variable.
briefing: SysForge, a DevOps monitoring tool running on PostgreSQL, has a metrics endpoint vulnerable to SQL injection. The PostgreSQL server is configured with superuser access and can execute system commands via the COPY ... PROGRAM directive. The flag is stored in a file at /var/flag.txt accessible to the postgres user. Use stacked queries to execute a COPY command that reads the file contents into a table, then extract it.
objective: Use SQL injection to leverage PostgreSQL's COPY PROGRAM to read /var/flag.txt and display the flag.
author: h4ck0rman
